arts.ttl: Liverpool ‘very interested’ in player – Reds ‘prepared to pay’ €50m+ in summer
arts.sum: Liverpool have their eyes set on Borussia Dortmund’s Nico Schlotterbeck for the summer window, according to Bild. The centre-back has been a key figure in his side’s defence and made 34 appearances this season. His performances have seen him attract interest from Liverpool while BVB want to offer an extension. arts.ttl: “Disgrace” – Fury over sanction against Liverpool, suggestion of untruths
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s suspension for his interaction with referee Michael Oliver after Liverpool’s draw with Everton is a ‘disgrace’. That’s at least according to former Liverpool goalkeeper Sander Westerveld on Viaplay, who believes there may have been some untruth to the referee’s statement.
